market_pulse: OMNIA and Hakkasan dominating April momentum with major artist lineups (deorro, Chris Lake, Twin Sick); Zouk momentum building with RL Grime + Lil Wayne dates; Tao Beach capitalizing on EDC week strategy; LIV and competitors leveraging emerging talent (DJ Precise, Matroda) mid-month.

content_gaps.description: Competitors actively promoting rising DJs (DJ Precise, Matroda, Twin Sick) for mid-week bookings to drive weekday traffic; LIV missing mid-week emerging artist positioning.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Book 2-3 rising talent DJs for Tuesday-Thursday rotation; amplify on Stories with countdown teasers and user-generated content.

content_gaps.description: Tao Beach and Palm Tree aggressively promoting EDC Week dayclub programming with Porter Robinson, DJ Snake, Steve Aoki; LIV Beach activity underrepresented in search visibility.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch dedicated Stories series for LIV Beach April lineup; cross-promote with TikTok influencers attending EDC Week.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA running weekly 'Deseo Latin Sundays' recurring event with dedicated branding and audience momentum; LIV not capitalizing on Latin market night.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Develop Latin-themed weekend programming for LIV; partner with Latin influencers for social amplification.
